Bus Timings

E307 Bus Timings Deira City Center to Sharjah Al Jubail Bus Station

December 26, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

One of the very famous attraction places in Dubai is located at Deira district.

This bus service bridges the gap between Deira City Center and Al Jubail Bus Station. Covering a distance of approximately 30 kilometers, this route ensures a seamless travel experience across the emirates. Contents

E307 Bus Timings

The E307 bus operates with a frequency designed to accommodate both peak and off-peak hours. From Monday to Saturday, buses start running at 6:40 AM and continue until 11:30 PM. On Sundays, the service begins slightly later at 7:00 AM and concludes at 10:30 PM. During peak hours, you can expect a bus every 20 to 30 minutes, while off-peak intervals may extend slightly. Here is the 307 bus timings that depart from Deira City Center.

From Deira City Center From Sharjah Al Jubail Bus Station
06:10 05:20
06:40 05:40
07:00 06:00
07:20 06:15
07:35 06:30
07:50 06:45
08:05 07:00
08:20 07:15
08:35 07:30
08:50 07:45
09:10 08:00
09:40 08:15
10:10 08:30
10:40 08:45
11:10 09:00
11:40 09:20
12:10 09:40
12:40 10:00
13:00 10:25
13:20 10:55
13:40 11:25
14:00 11:55
14:20 12:25
14:40 13:00
14:55 13:30
15:10 13:45
15:25 14:00
15:40 14:30
15:55 14:50
16:10 15:10
16:30 15:30
16:45 15:50
17:00 16:05
17:15 16:20
17:30 16:40
17:45 17:00
18:00 17:20
18:15 17:39
18:30 17:55
18:45 18:10
19:00 18:25
19:15 18:40
19:30 18:55
19:45 19:10

20:45 20:10

22:20 21:40
22:40 22:00
23:00 22:20
23:20 22:40
23:40 23:00
00:00 23:20
00:20 23:40

Download PDF Bus E307

To view the full schedule, you can head over to the official RTA website, or follow this link for E307 Bus Timings.## E307 Bus Route

The journey on the E307 bus begins at the Deira City Center Bus Station.

As the bus embarks on its route, it makes several strategic stops that offer both convenience and connectivity.

  1. Deira City Center Bus Station

  2. Ithihad Road Stops

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Wahda Road

  2. King Faisal Road

  3. Al Jubail Bus Station

These stops not only cater to daily commuters but also to visitors looking to explore different parts of the city. Each stop is strategically placed to ensure accessibility to major landmarks and commercial centers.

Traveling on the E307 bus is not only convenient but also affordable. The fare for a one-way trip is approximately AED 10-15.

The E307 bus is equipped with facilities designed to make your journey as comfortable as possible. Key features include:- Air Conditioning

  • Comfortable Seating
  • Free Wi-Fi
  • Clean Environment
  • Onboard Displays

These facilities make the E307 bus an attractive option for those looking to travel between Dubai and Sharjah without the hassle of driving.## Journey Experience

As you approach Sharjah, the city’s cultural vibe becomes more apparent, with stops near popular attractions like Al Noor Mosque and the famous Blue Souk. This route gives you a glimpse of the contrasting yet complementary urban landscapes of Dubai and Sharjah.## Conclusion

The E307 bus route from Deira City Center to Sharjah Al Jubail is a testament to Dubai’s efficient public transport system. It offers a reliable, comfortable, and cost-effective means of commuting between two of the UAE’s busiest cities. And as you can see at the E307 bus timings above, you can see at our website for latest update timings.

Whether you’re a daily commuter, a shopper, or a tourist, the E307 bus provides a seamless travel experience, connecting key landmarks and commercial hubs along its route. So, next time you’re planning a trip between Dubai and Sharjah, hop on the E307 and enjoy the journey.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 26, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
